ctx.name: Darren
ctx.notes: Plays football very well. Loves chocolate.

focusPoints.label: Motivation and energy levels
focusPoints.reason: Notes highlight his football performance. Could be worth exploring how his energy and motivation are tracking lately.

transcript.question: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
transcript.answer: It took me a long time to kick a ball after i ate too much chocolate last week

transcript.question: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
transcript.answer: good, if i eat a lot of chocolate

transcript.question: What does your recovery look like between sessions?
transcript.answer: good, as long as i have a chocolate drink. but sometimes i can't find a shop to buy chocolate from.

transcript.question: How is your body holding up after matches and training lately?
What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
transcript.answer: finding new types of chocolate, one from every country. oh and football, i want to become the best footballer in the world. and also i want mr beast to sponsor me with his delicious chocolate bars, i will happily wear a shirt with his chocolate bars on it

transcript.question: What would make this season feel like a step forward for you?
transcript.answer: if you know where i can find more chocolate, not just food or drinks but other ways to ingest chocolate

transcript.question: What part of your game are you most trying to sharpen at the moment?
transcript.answer: goalie, and between waiting for the ball to come back to me, how i can consume as much chocolate as possible

transcript.question: How are you using the feedback you have been getting lately?
transcript.answer: not much, we don't talk about chocolate enough
